creator: aasoft@gmail.com
text:
Of course I don't have BSD patch, you're right. I shouldn't have assumed
that I have it just because I have a newer version of FreeBSD than the one
for which PR 180821 was created.

A Makefile patch certainly looks better to me, compared to changing the
#include path.
I wonder what/how this problem is going to affect on a larger scale. i.e.
if there are other ports with diffs in the same format, they'll likely need
a similar OSVERSION check. So maybe the difference in path (and stripping)
handling needs to be taken to whomever is directly responsible for the BSD
patch?

Anton


On Mon, Aug 12, 2013 at 9:00 AM, Pedro Giffuni <pfg@freebsd.org> wrote:

> As I said.. it's a bit ugly but the attached patch to the port should work.
>
> Pedro.
>
